summary: VERIFIED: Backend fix for deal conversion income flow is working. convert_deal_to_project creates income with status=pending_approval. Accountant sees and can approve/reject pending income via /api/approvals/unified. Frontend AccountsBoard Approvals tab working correctly with MaskedValue showing masked amounts. CRE Board has frontend rendering issue - stuck on Loading state despite API working.

ui_bugs.issue: Page stuck on 'Loading...' state for extended time. API responses are normal (~5s) but page doesn't render content

action_items: Investigate CREBoard.jsx rendering issue - page shows 'Loading...' despite API returning data in 5s
Check if there's a Promise rejection in CREBoard.jsx fetchData() that silently fails
critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix VERIFIED: operations.py line 382-402 creates income record with status='pending_approval' when advance_amount > 0
Backend fix VERIFIED: operations.py line 529-548 same fix applied for convert_re_project
GET /api/approvals/unified correctly returns income with status=pending_approval (line 410 in financial.py)

success_rate.frontend: 80% - AccountsBoard Approvals working, CREBoard has Loading issue

seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used. Project: proj_murugan_001. Income: inc_murugan_pending was approved during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The backend fix for deal conversion creating income records with pending_approval status is VERIFIED WORKING. CREBoard has a frontend rendering issue where page stays on Loading... despite API working correctly (dashboard returns in ~5s). AccountsBoard Approvals tab working correctly - shows pending income with Approve/Reject buttons, MaskedValue shows ₹***** for accountant role.

features_tested.4_accountant_approve_income: PASS - POST /api/approvals/income/{id}/approve changes status to approved
features_tested.5_cre_dashboard: PASS - GET /api/cre/dashboard returns correct data including pending_payment_count
features_tested.6_frontend_accounts_approvals: PASS - Approvals tab shows pending income with Approve/Reject buttons
features_tested.7_frontend_masked_values: PASS - MaskedValue shows ₹***** for accountant, click to reveal
features_tested.8_frontend_cre_board: ISSUE - Page stuck on Loading... state despite API working
